title: Choose your physical bundle
excerpt: Set up a standard or custom physical bundle. Stripe helps you set up your physical bundle, which consists of a card, a carrier (the letter sent to cardholders on which the card is affixed), and an envelope. You have different options for both the standard and custom bundles. For [bulk orders](https://docs.stripe.com/issuing/cards/physical/ship-cards.md#bulk-issuance) of multiple cards shipped to a single destination, we don’t include carriers. To get started, go directly to the [Designs](https://dashboard.stripe.com/issuing/personalization-designs) tab in the Issuing Dashboard. We prompt you to create a design by uploading your logo and adding your carrier text. The standard bundle includes the following: - **Card:** A plastic black or white card with your logo (company logo).…
